news.headline: STEQEYMA® biosimilar to STELARA® debuts in U.S., priced 85% lower, with same indications as reference product.
news.summary: STEQEYMA®, a biosimilar to STELARA®, has been launched in the U.S., offering the same approved uses as the original product. The wholesale acquisition cost (WAC) of STEQEYMA is set at 85% less than the current WAC of STELARA. This price reduction aims to make the biosimilar more accessible to patients in need.

news.headline: GC Cell starts Phase 1 trial for GCC2005 CD5 CAR-NK therapy in South Korea. CEO Sungyong Won leads; first patient dosed.
news.summary: In Yongin, South Korea, on March 12, 2025, GC Cell (KRX:144510) led by CEO Sungyong Won, disclosed the launch of their domestic Phase 1 clinical trial for GCC2005 (AB‑205), an innovative CD5 CAR‑NK cell therapy. The commencement of the trial with the administration of the first dose to a patient is a pivotal step...

news.headline: SEC whistleblowers hosting investment contract summit in Miami (3/14-3/15) with new data from Howey-in-the-Hills.
news.summary: An event was held in Howey-in-the-Hills, Florida on March 12, 2025, where experts discussed the "Howey Test" and investment contracts. The Summit aimed to educate attendees with new data and insights. SECwhistleblown.com and TheWhistleIsBlown.com organized the event to reveal important information regarding investment contracts.

news.headline: Intel's new CEO, Lip-Bu Tan, is making a crucial strategic move amid declining sales and increasing competition.
Aris Mining reports record Q4 2024 financial results with strong EBITDA growth and announces 25% capacity expansion at Marmato.
news.summary: A mining company based in Vancouver, Aris Mining Corporation, has released its financial and operational outcomes for the periods of Q4 2024 and the full year of 2024. The company, listed as ARIS on the TSX and ARMN on the NYSE-A, reported key figures regarding its performance during these times. The results cover the three months ended December 31, 2024, alongside the entire fiscal year. The detailed financial information and relevant statistics were communicated in the announcement.

news.headline: Investor rights law firm Halper Sadeh LLC is investigating JWN and ALBT for potential securities law violations.
news.summary: Recently in New York on March 12, 2025, Halper Sadeh LLC, a law firm focusing on investor rights, has commenced investigations into various companies regarding potential breaches of federal securities laws and failures to uphold fiduciary responsibilities to shareholders. Among these companies is Nordstrom, Inc. (NYSE: JWN) which is being scrutinized for its sale transaction.

news.headline: Halper Sadeh LLC investigates TSVT, BRDG, GB for violations and breaches on behalf of shareholders.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Halper Sadeh LLC, a legal firm specializing in investor rights, has launched investigations into several companies suspected of breaking federal securities regulations and failing in their fiduciary responsibilities towards shareholders. The focus is on 2seventy bio, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSVT) concerning potential violations. Interested parties should pay attention to developments in this matter for potential outcomes.

news.headline: SpaceX: Crew-10 mission discussed on X post
SpaceX, NASA pause launch of Crew-10 mission
Lincoln National stock's IBD SmartSelect rating increased from 94 to 96, showing improvement.
news.summary: Lincoln National experienced a boost in its IBD SmartSelect Composite Rating, climbing from 94 to 96 on Wednesday. This upgrade propelled the Lincoln National stock to achieve a robust 95-Plus Composite Rating. The company's stock witnessed noteworthy progression, indicating positive developments in its market performance.

news.headline: Google's Gemma 3 AI model surpasses larger models x15, running on single GPU, for creative writing but faces limitations.
news.summary: A recent assessment found that Google's open-source Gemma 3 outperforms AI models 15 times larger when operating on just one GPU. However, despite this significant advantage, Gemma 3 is constrained by notable limitations.

news.headline: Grace Merrell Slezak recognized as Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence in Real Estate with over 30 years experience.
news.summary: Grace Merrell Slezak, a renowned real estate professional with over 30 years of experience, has been recognized in The Inner Circle as a Pinnacle Professional Member of the Inner Circle of Excellence for her outstanding contributions to the real estate industry. This accolade solidifies her status as a top professional in the field.

news.headline: Carriage Services partners with Express Funeral Funding to enhance services and expand market, benefitting customers and companies.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Carriage Services, Inc. (NYSE: CSV) revealed an enhanced nationwide partnership with Express Funeral Funding, a prominent player in at-need insurance assignment funding. This venture is anticipated to bring substantial benefits to both entities and their clientele, leveraging Carriage's extensive national presence alongside Express Funeral Funding's expertise in insurance assignment funding. The collaboration aims to amplify value creation for all stakeholders involved.

news.headline: Armor partners with Oracle to enhance cybersecurity solutions, boosting protection for critical workloads.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Armor, a reputable company specializing in cybersecurity and compliance solutions, revealed its participation in the Oracle Partner Program. With this partnership, Armor aims to work closely with Oracle to deliver top-notch, cost-efficient services to businesses. This collaboration is anticipated to offer organizations enhanced performance and cost-effective solutions in the realm of cybersecurity and compliance.

news.headline: PickUp USA Fitness opens new location in Manchester, NH at 100 William Loeb Dr, marking successful launch.
news.summary: A new branch of PickUp USA Fitness, a gym franchise specializing in basketball, has recently opened at 100 William Loeb Dr, Manchester, NH 03109. The soft launch of this location, which took place on March 12, 2025, has been remarkably successful, marking a significant milestone for the company's expansion. This newest establishment adds to the growing number of PickUp USA Fitness facilities across the nation.

news.headline: FTC initiates wide antitrust investigation against Microsoft (MSFT) under Trump administration.
Vivid Seats reissues financial results for 2024, correcting errors in the statement of cash flows, trading as NASDAQ: SEAT.
news.summary: Vivid Seats Inc. (NASDAQ: SEAT), a prominent marketplace connecting millions of buyers with ticket sellers for events, has re-issued a press release detailing its financial performance for the full year and fourth quarter ending on December 31, 2024. This correction, issued on March 12, 2025, at 6:30 a.m. ET, corrects the consolidated statement of cash flows by replacing "Loss on extinguishment of debt" with "Adjustment of liabilities under TRA" in the Cash flows from operating activities. Moreover, a new line item called "Investments in developed technology" has been added to the Cash flows from investing activities section.

news.headline: Horizon Petroleum prepares for first production in Poland at Lachowice gas development; update on operations progress.
news.summary: Horizon Petroleum Ltd., a company listed on the TSXV under the ticker HPL, is making significant strides towards initiating production at its Lachowice gas development in Bielsko-Biala. The company recently released an operations update on March 12, 2025, indicating positive progress in this crucial project. Horizon's stock is also traded under the tickers FRA: HPM and Tradegate: HPM, showcasing its presence in multiple markets. This development marks a significant step forward in the company's strategic efforts to tap into the lucrative gas sector, with numbers indicating promising growth potential in the near future.

news.headline: Millicom and Telefonica finalize sale agreement in Colombia, undisclosed amount involved.
news.summary: Recently, the unemployment rate in the country decreased to a record-low 3.8%, showing a significant improvement from the previous quarter. The number of jobless individuals currently stands at 5.6 million, marking a decrease of 200,000 people seeking employment. Additionally, the economy added 300,000 new jobs, reflecting a positive trend in the job market. The government officials have noted that these statistics indicate a strong and growing economy, with increased opportunities for workers. This decrease in unemployment rate is a positive sign for the overall economic health of the nation.

news.headline: Asian stocks set to climb as US inflation data comes in below expectations. Markets react positively.
Unisync Corp. discloses voting results of AGM held in Vancouver with 92% approval rate, TSX:"UNI" and OTC: “USYNF”.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Unisync Corp. (TSX: UNI) (OTC: USYNF) disclosed the outcomes of the Annual General Meeting of its shareholders convened in Vancouver, British Columbia.

news.headline: Dollar General to release Q4 results, focusing on revenue, profit margins amid competition from Walmart and Amazon.
news.summary: Dollar General Corp (NYSE:DG) is preparing to announce its fourth-quarter financial results prior to the opening bell on Thursday. Investors are eager to see updates on the quarterly revenue and profit margins, especially with competition heating up from major players like Walmart and Amazon. With cash-strapped consumers looking for value in a high-inflation environment, discount retailers are seeing increased foot traffic. According to Placer.ai data, the numbers indicate a trend towards more frequent visits to these types of stores.

news.headline: PBF Energy prices upsized $800M of 9.875% senior notes due 2030.
news.summary: Parsippany, New Jersey - Today, PBF Energy Inc. (NYSE: PBF) shared that its subsidiary, PBF Holding Company LLC, successfully priced $800 million worth of 9.875% senior notes due in 2030. The Notes were issued by PBF Holding.

news.headline: CPKC's subsidiary is issuing US $1.2 billion in debt with notes due in 2030 and 2035.eci
news.summary: In a recent announcement on March 12, 2025, Canadian Pacific Kansas City Limited shared that its subsidiary, Canadian Pacific Railway Company, will be issuing a total of US$1.2 billion in notes. This includes US$600 million in 4.800% Notes due in 2030 and US$600 million in 5.200% Notes due in 2035. The parent company's stock trades on both the TSX and NYSE under the symbols CP, reflecting their continued growth and financial activities in the rail industry.

news.headline: Telix Pharmaceuticals has developed a generator technology for producing lead-212; marks completion of first production.
news.summary: An announcement was made today by Telix Pharmaceuticals Limited that they have created and confirmed a pioneering generator technology for generating lead-212 (212Pb) in Melbourne, Australia and Indianapolis. This technology has been validated and the first production has been successfully completed. Telix, identified by the stock codes ASX: TLX and Nasdaq: TLX, is the company behind this major development in the medical field.

news.headline: Intel selects Lip-Bu Tan as CEO to lead turnaround, a prominent tech investor and executive taking charge.
news.summary: The technology company specializing in semiconductors has selected Lip-Bu Tan, a prominent figure in the tech investment and executive world, as its latest CEO.

news.headline: Singapore's Bitdeer, a Bitcoin miner, increased its BTC holdings, now valued at nearly $87 million since 2025 started.
news.summary: A Bitcoin miner from Singapore, Bitdeer, has notably increased its BTC holdings since the start of 2025 and currently possesses nearly $87 million in Bitcoin.

news.headline: Swiss Water reports fiscal year end 2024 results; financials for three months ended Dec 31, 2024.
news.summary: Based in Vancouver, British Columbia, on March 12, 2025, Swiss Water Decaffeinated Coffee Inc. (TSX:SWP) announced its financial performance for the quarter and fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024. Swiss Water is recognized as a prominent specialty coffee business and top-tier chemical-free coffee decaffeinator. The financial results reported are in Canadian dollars.

news.headline: FHLB Dallas and Texas Capital Bank award $1.98M grant for 60-unit supportive housing in Austin, Texas. Ceremony held for groundbreaking.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, a $1.98 million Affordable Housing Program (AHP) grant has been awarded by the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas) through Texas Capital Bank to support the development of a 60-unit supportive housing community for the housing-fragile population. The grant was given to SAFE, an organization in Austin focused on breaking multigenerational cycles of violence and abuse. A ceremonial groundbreaking took place this week to mark the occasion and signify the beginning of this important initiative.

news.headline: Daktronics to showcase at Sidoti Virtual Investor Conference on March 19-20, 2025, as a top dynamic display maker.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Daktronics Inc. (Nasdaq: DAKT), a prominent company specializing in dynamic video communication displays and control systems, disclosed its participation in the Sidoti Virtual Investor Conference scheduled for March 19-20, 2025. The event will feature management presentations as well as opportunities for individual investor meetings. Daktronics Inc. is recognized for its top-quality products serving clients globally.

news.headline: CGI priced US$650M in 5-year notes, issuing senior unsecured notes. Details on TSX: GIB.A, NYSE: GIB.
news.summary: CGI, traded as GIB.A on the TSX and GIB on the NYSE, disclosed on March 12, 2025, that they have set the terms for issuing senior unsecured notes. The company plans to release a total of US$650 million in 5-year senior notes as part of the offering.

news.headline: Midland Tyre Services reduces fleet accidents by 54% using Samsara, a technology solution.
news.summary: A tire service company in London, Midland Tyre Services, has successfully decreased accidents within its fleet by an impressive 54% through the utilization of Samsara technology. This indicates a significant improvement in safety measures for the company's vehicles.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency market reacts positively to lower CPI with BTC reaching $84k. ETH/BTC levels resemble Dec 2020. Whales accumulating 65k BTC during recent crashes. House resolution against IRS DeFI rule. US should acquire 25% BTC: Saylor. Sony and LINE collaborate on blockchain. VC funding declines to levels below 2017-18. CBOE eyes staking for Fidelity ETH ETF. SEC delays decision on XRP, SOL, LTC, DOGE ETF. StanChart ties BTC pain to equities. Bybit blamed by OKX for hack.
news.summary: BTC has bounced back to $84,000 following a milder than expected CPI report. The value of ETH/BTC has reached levels not seen since December 2020. A major ETH holder was forced to sell off assets, sparking fear, uncertainty, and doubt (FUD) surrounding the potential spread of negativity from the situation. Despite recent market downturns, whales have managed to accumulate 65,000 BTC. Seven additional representatives have pledged their support for Senator Lummis' proposal to purchase 1 million BTC. CBOE is looking to integrate staking into Fidelity's ETH ETF. The SEC has postponed decisions regarding the establishment of ETFs for XRP, SOL, LTC, and DOGE. Analysts from 10X Research predict BTC could reach $73,000 soon. Standard Chartered suggests that BTC's struggles are connected to movements in traditional equities markets. The House of Representatives has approved a resolution to eliminate the IRS's DeFI broker regulation. A House committee has initiated discussions on stablecoins. The White House has confirmed that there are no imminent plans for additional summits focused on cryptocurrencies. Michael Saylor advocates for the U.S. to secure 25% of the total BTC supply. Venture capital funding for the industry is dropping below the levels observed during the cryptocurrency boom in 2017-2018. Metaplanet has acquired $13.5 million worth of BTC, while Hong Kong-based Lead Benefit has invested $27 million in BTC. Sony and LINE have announced a partnership in the blockchain sector. OKX is pointing fingers at Bybit during a hack investigation.

news.headline: US CPI lower than expected at 3.1% vs 3.2%, sparking talk of rate cuts. Chance of a May cut now 31.4%, up 3x from last month. BTC price fell from $84,000 to $83,000 due to trade war uncertainty. Fed may cut rates by 2025 to refinance $9.2 trillion debt.
news.summary: The US core Consumer Price Index (CPI) for inflation was lower than expected at 3.1%, beating the expected 3.2%, accompanied by a 0.1% drop in headline inflation. Analysts predict this may lead to a potential interest rate cut by the Federal Reserve, with markets now pricing a 31.4% chance of a May cut, a significant increase from last month. There is a belief that the Federal Reserve will cut interest rates by June 2025. Despite the positive inflation numbers, Bitcoin's price decreased due to ongoing macroeconomic uncertainty and trade war concerns. President Trump's focus on interest rate cuts could be linked to refinancing approximately $9.2 trillion in debt by 2025, as a failure to refinance could increase the national debt and interest payments. The Federal Reserve has shown caution in rushing to cut rates, with analysts suggesting that the lack of rate cuts could trigger a bear market. Market participants speculate that President Trump may be intentionally crashing markets to push for rate cuts, a notion opposed by Federal Reserve officials who are calling for a pause in rate cuts until inflation decreases.

news.headline: Education Dept. plans to reduce workforce as part of initiative to boost DOGE value.
Ulysses "Junior" Bridgeman passes away. Family mourns the loss of husband, father, grandfather.
news.summary: Louisville, K.Y., March 12, 2025 - The family of Ulysses "Junior" Bridgeman shared a statement regarding his passing today. They announced with deep sorrow the death of the beloved Ulysses "Junior" Bridgeman, who was a cherished husband, father, and grandfather.

news.headline: Cliquify introduces CLEO Intelligence™ AI technology to enhance employer branding with data insights.
news.summary: Today in New York, Cliquify revealed the introduction of CLEO Intelligence™, a cutting-edge AI-driven data technology aimed at revolutionizing the way companies enhance their employer brand. This new tool is set to transform organizational understanding and strategies in this realm.

news.headline: Trump comments at event with Irish Prime Minister Conclude
Martin hopes to welcome Trump to Ireland soon
Rio Tinto and Edify Energy sign solar agreement supplying 90% power to Rio Tinto's Gladstone operations for 20 years.
news.summary: In Melbourne, Australia, Rio Tinto and Edify Energy have finalized two solar and battery hybrid services agreements to enhance the provision of dependable and cost-effective electricity to Rio Tinto’s Gladstone aluminium operations in Queensland. As per the deals, Rio Tinto is set to acquire 90% of the power and battery storage production from the Smoky Creek & Guthrie’s Gap Solar Power Stations for a duration of 20 years. Edify Energy will be responsible for the construction, ownership, and operation of these projects.

news.headline: SS&C ALPS Advisors splits ALPS Equal Sector Weight ETF (EQL) shares 3-for-1 on April 1, 2025.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, SS&C ALPS Advisors revealed that the Board of Trustees of the ALPS ETF Trust has given the green light for a 3-for-1 split of the ALPS Equal Sector Weight ETF (NYSE Arca: EQL). This split will come into effect at the market's opening on April 1,...

news.headline: Walker & Dunlop arranges $176M credit facility for single-family rental portfolio in Atlanta.
news.summary: Walker & Dunlop, Inc., based in Bethesda, Md, disclosed arranging a $176 million credit facility for seven single-family rental communities in different Atlanta, Georgia MSA neighborhoods. The financing was facilitated by the Walker & Dunlop New York Capital Markets team, helmed by Jonathan Schwartz, Aaron Appel, Keith Kurland, Adam Schwartz, Michael Ianno, Jackson Irwin, and Christopher de Raet, representing institutional investors under J.P. Morgan's guidance.

Wintrust wins 14 Best Bank awards in Middle Market Banking by Crisil Coalition Greenwich, 10 national, 4 regional.
news.summary: In Rosemont, Illinois, on March 12, 2025, Wintrust Financial Corporation (Nasdaq: WTFC) received a notable recognition from Crisil Coalition Greenwich. The company secured an impressive total of 14 Coalition Greenwich Best Bank Awards for Middle Market Banking. This accolade signifies Wintrust's remarkable consistency, as it marks the 10th consecutive year of acknowledgment by the organization. Setting a new record for the company, this achievement includes 10 national awards along with four regional awards specific to the Midwest region.

news.headline: Tesla stock jumps as analysts cut price targets, warning of brand damage. Delivery and earnings estimates slashed.
news.summary: Despite analysts cutting price targets and slashing delivery and earnings estimates for Tesla, the company saw a rebound on Wednesday. Analysts have expressed concerns about potential brand "destruction," leading to price target cuts. However, Tesla stock jumped, showing resilience in the face of these warnings. The company's ability to bounce back may indicate confidence among investors, despite the negative sentiment from analysts. This positive movement comes as analysts adjust their estimates, with the future trajectory of Tesla's brand and performance still uncertain.
